Table conductor with columns Conductor_ID (int), Name (text), Age (int), Nationality (text), Year_of_Work (int)

Table orchestra with columns Orchestra_ID (int), Orchestra (text), Conductor_ID (int), Record_Company (text), Year_of_Founded (real), Major_Record_Format (text) — foreign keys: Conductor_ID → conductor(Conductor_ID)

Table performance with columns Performance_ID (int), Orchestra_ID (int), Type (text), Date (text), Official_ratings_(millions) (real), Weekly_rank (text), Share (text) — foreign keys: Orchestra_ID → orchestra(Orchestra_ID)
Table show with columns Show_ID (int), Performance_ID (int), If_first_show (bool), Result (text), Attendance (real) — foreign keys: Performance_ID → performance(Performance_ID)
